name: blank-space
description: AI coding agent in your browser

commit.message:
fix: Security and robustness hardening

- conversations.js: replace ...msg spread with explicit field allowlist
  to prevent arbitrary client-supplied fields from being persisted
- gemini.js: redact internal error.message from 500 responses
- FileExplorer.jsx: HTML-escape user content before inline markdown
  formatting to prevent XSS in preview panel; also replace
  window.confirm() with ConfirmDialog for folder deletion
- assistant/index.js: wrap JSON.parse() of tool call arguments in
  try/catch, returning a structured error to the model instead of
  crashing the agent loop

fix: Replace window.confirm() with ConfirmDialog for deletions

Replace native browser confirm() dialogs with the shared ConfirmDialog
component in SearchModal (conversation deletion) and ComputerPage
(project deletion) for consistent UX across the app.

feat: Add auto-suggest follow-up questions after every AI response

Adds Grok-style suggestion buttons below each assistant message across all 3 agents (chat, assistant, code). A single generateSuggestions() call in the orchestration layer attaches 2 contextual follow-ups to every result; clicking one sends it as a new message. Suggestions are hidden while the AI is processing and only shown on the last response.

fix: Remove wallpaper preset system, restore LandingPage, fix static asset routing

- Remove entire wallpaper component directory (BackgroundWaves, StarryBackground, presets, waves)
- Remove dead wallpaperMapping.js service file
- Fix LandingPage crash: useTheme() only provides { mode }, not currentTheme/selectedTheme
- Replace currentTheme.backgroundColor/gradient with theme.colors.bg.primary
- Fix default aiColorPalette in generate.js: 'matchWallpaper' → 'dark-professional'
- Remove wallpaper references from chat.js intent prompt strings
- Fix vercel.json rewrite: add images/, icons/, docs/ to exclusion list so static assets are not rewritten to index.html in vercel dev

refactor: Remove dead code, wire up shared icons and utilities

- Remove unused stripe dependency from package.json
- Delete orphaned AboutTab component (never imported)
- Remove unused uniqueSlug export from slugify.js
- Wire up shared fileIcons.jsx in FileExplorer, FilePanel, FileUploadModal
- Wire up shared formatSize.js in FilePanel, FileUploadModal
- Replace duplicate useIsMobile hook in FileExplorer with shared import
- Consolidate duplicate CloseIcon, PlusIcon, AppsIcon, MenuIcon from
  icons.jsx across 10 components (-630 lines)

feat: Toggle sidebar by clicking empty space

Use event delegation to expand/collapse the sidebar when clicking
any empty area, while preserving normal behavior for buttons,
inputs, and links.
fix: Add catch-all rewrite for SPA client-side routing on Vercel

fix: Increase serverless function timeout, fix system folder deletion, and improve timeout UX

- Add maxDuration: 60 to api/gemini.js and api/chat.js
- Allow deleting files inside assistant/code folders without deleting the folders themselves
- Show user-friendly message on timeout instead of raw error
- Remove debug console.logs from _auth.js

refactor: Restructure assistant system prompt to professional format

Standardize section headers to # UPPERCASE convention, reorder sections
for logical flow, trim examples from 8 to 5, and merge Response Style
into Rules.

feat: Add web search tool, folder organization, and fix markdown list rendering

Add web_search tool for assistant to look up live data (weather, news,
prices). Update system prompt with default folder organization
(research/, notes/, lists/, drafts/) and matching few-shot examples.
Fix markdown preview: wrap list items in proper ul/ol elements, fix
margin override bug, and show relative file path in preview header.

feat: Add delete_file tool and bulk delete buttons in settings

Add delete_file tool to the assistant agent for deleting files by path,
with full integration across tool registry, formatters, and prompts.
Fix duplicate plan emission by moving it before the tool execution loop.
Add "Delete All Assistant Files" and "Delete All Code Files" buttons
to the Account settings tab with confirmation flows.

fix: Split plan steps onto separate lines and remove context metadata

Split numbered plan items into individual ThinkingBlock entries so each
step displays on its own line. Remove the "Context: X files, Y folders"
line from thinking output as it provided no useful information to users.

fix: Prevent assistant agent from repeating plan in final response

Update the assistant system prompt to treat the plan as internal
thinking that should not be surfaced in the final user-facing message.
Add explicit "Respond" step instructing the model to give only the
outcome. Surface the agent's plan/thinking text as a ThinkingBlock
update so it remains visible for transparency without polluting the
response.

feat: Add conversation history to agents and fix edit_file upsert

- Remove conversationIntent dead code from useChat.js (cached intent
  prevented re-classification on follow-up messages)
- Pass conversationHistory to intent classifier for context-aware
  routing across multi-turn conversations
- Pass conversationHistory to Assistant agent so it can reference
  prior messages (e.g. Chat agent weather results)
- Update assistant prompt to guide AI: write_file for new files,
  edit_file for existing files
- Add update flag to edit_file tool so backend updates existing
  Firestore documents instead of creating duplicates
fix: Match FileExplorer tree items to sidebar styling

fix: Fix folder delete not updating UI and remove folder creation from UI

Normalize path in deleteFolder by stripping leading slash so state
filtering matches stored paths. Remove New Folder button and all
related code from FileExplorer (desktop and mobile).
fix: Align FileExplorer spacing with sidebar design standards

fix: Remove deleted folders from expandedFolders to refresh tree view

After deleting a folder, the expandedFolders Set still contained the
deleted path, causing stale items to appear in the tree. Now properly
removes the deleted folder and all its children from expandedFolders.

fix: Remove eager file loading, all agents use lazy loading

- Delete getFilesForAI() call in sendMessage - no agent needs pre-loaded files
- Code Agent uses glob/read tools, Assistant Agent uses fileContext
- Update log message to clarify it's finding existing apps, not loading files

fix: Stop eager loading all workspace files on every message

Previously, every chat message would load ALL binary files from the
user's workspace and send them to the AI - even for simple requests
like "create a todo app". This caused Gemini API errors when files
had unsupported MIME types (application/octet-stream).

Changes:
- Only send files that users explicitly attach to their message
- Skip binary file fetching in getFilesForAI() (text files only)
- Add MIME type filtering in formatFilesForGemini() as safety net

fix: Make loading spinner smaller but thicker

Change from 48px/4px to 32px/5px for better proportions

docs: Update README to reflect current architecture and roadmap

- Simplify architecture diagram to match actual src/ and api/ structure
- Remove references to deleted apps/ and packages/core directories
- Update roadmap: web (current), iOS and Android planned
- Clean up formatting

fix: Style loading preview text and spinner to match app design

- Thicken spinner border from 3px to 4px for better visibility
- Use base font size and normal weight to match sidebar text style
- Add Inter font family to ensure consistent typography

chore: Remove unused code (validation module, legacy auth, xAI client)

Delete unused files identified during codebase analysis:
- Entire validation module (never integrated)
- Legacy SignInPage/SignUpPage (replaced by AuthModal)
- xaiClient.js (never imported)
- LoadingDots.jsx, FileExplorer.jsx, xPixel.js
- Dead exports from llmClient.js and constants
chore: Remove test scripts from root

chore: Remove unused packages/core (duplicate of src/services)

- Delete packages/ directory (was copy of src/services, never used)
- Delete pnpm-workspace.yaml (no longer needed)
- Update README to reflect simplified structure

chore: Remove unused apps/ directory

- Delete apps/api (duplicate of /api)
- Delete apps/web (empty placeholder)
- Update pnpm-workspace.yaml to remove apps/*
- Update README with accurate directory structure

chore: Remove AWS deployment files, keep Vercel-only monorepo

- Delete serverless.yml and Lambda handlers directory
- Remove serverless dependencies from apps/api/package.json
- Update README to reflect Vercel-only deployment
- Simplify roadmap to focus on mobile app

feat: Add monorepo structure for AWS SaaS deployment

Architecture changes:
- packages/core: Portable business logic (@blankspace/core)
  - orchestration, tools, prompts, utils, config
  - Can run on any JavaScript runtime
- apps/api: AWS Lambda-ready backend (@blankspace/api)
  - Lambda handlers with Vercel adapter
  - serverless.yml for AWS deployment
- apps/web: React frontend placeholder (@blankspace/web)

New files:
- pnpm-workspace.yaml: Monorepo workspace config
- apps/api/serverless.yml: AWS Lambda + API Gateway config
- apps/api/src/handlers/: Lambda handler wrappers
- packages/core/src/index.js: Clean module exports

Updated README with:
- High-level architecture diagram
- Directory structure documentation
- Agent system explanation
- Data flow diagram
- Multiple deployment options (Vercel, AWS, Docker)

refactor: Modularize agent API code with shared utilities

- Extract getAuthHeaders and executeFunction to apiUtils.js
- Centralize retry configs and model names in apiConfig.js
- Create fileFormatters.js for OpenAI/Gemini file formatting
- Reduce code duplication across Code, Chat, and Assistant agents
- Simplify orchestration router with centralized config

Net reduction: ~260 lines of duplicate code

chore: Remove unused components, templates, and utilities

Delete legacy code no longer used in the application including chat
components, pricing page, usage display, UI decorations, template
examples, and date utilities.

fix: Protect system folders and add preview loading state

- Allow user agent to write to code/ folder for project deletion
- Prevent deletion of assistant and code system folders (UI + API)
- Add loading spinner to PreviewPanel while files are fetching
- Pass filesLoading state through component chain to preview

fix: Restore nested result format in ToolExecutor for Gemini compatibility

The ToolExecutor return format was changed during reorganization from:
  { success: true, result, tool: toolName }
to:
  { ...result, tool: toolName }

This broke Gemini's function calling - it returned 500 "Internal error
encountered" because it expects function responses to have a nested
`result` field rather than the tool output spread at the top level.

Reverts to the original nested format that Gemini accepts.

refactor: Consolidate storage to FileSystem-centric architecture

- Make artifacts lightweight (metadata only: name, projectSlug, icon)
- Remove files and chatHistory from artifact storage
- Add getFilesByProjectSlug() to FileSystemContext for loading project files
- Load files from FileSystem when artifact is selected in App.jsx
- Add cascade delete: deleting artifact also removes code/{projectSlug}/ files
- Simplify API to only allow metadata updates (name, icon)

fix: Add random suffix to project slugs and fix file sync

- Add random suffix option to slugify() for unique project folders
- Update ArtifactContext to use random suffix (e.g., todo-app-7f3k2)
- Fix API endpoint to save projectSlug, icon, and chatHistory
- Strip existing code/ prefix before adding new prefix (prevents nesting)
- Simplify intentClassifier to not return debug (handled via @app)
- Keep projectSlug unchanged on artifact rename

feat: Add agent-scoped file workspaces and mobile file explorer

- Add agent scoping (assistant/, code/) with server-side enforcement
- Create central scope config (agentScopes.js) and slugify utility
- Sync code agent files to code/{projectSlug}/ folder
- Add mobile drill-down navigation for file explorer (<768px)
- Update file preview to support JSX and other code files
- Fix duplicate folder key warning in FileExplorer

refactor: Reorganize orchestration with consistent agent structure

- Move all agents to orchestration/agents/ (assistant, chat, code)
- Create MCP-style tools for Assistant Agent (list_directory, read_file, etc.)
- Add lazy-loading file system architecture in FileSystemContext
- Improve intent classifier to recognize file/folder queries
- Fix ToolExecutor to spread results instead of nesting
- Remove dead code: old doc* tools, RemoteSync, OpenAI provider, responseNormalizer

feat: Add Assistant Agent for document operations

- Add new 'assistant' intent for document queries and operations
- Create Assistant Provider with single-phase workflow using gpt-5-mini
- Add document tools: doc_list, doc_read, doc_write, doc_edit
- Fix VirtualFS glob to handle leading slash in paths
- Add localStorage fallback for file system in dev mode
- Add document preview panel to FileExplorer
- Only report actual file changes (not unchanged files)

feat: Add Files page with macOS Finder-style column view

- Add full-screen Files page at /files route
- Implement column-based folder navigation
- Add file upload, folder creation, and folder deletion
- Add API endpoints for folder management
- Update sidebar with Files navigation item

refactor: Improve thinking UI with agent and LLM info

- Remove animated LoadingDots component, use ThinkingBlock consistently
- Show Agent (Chat/Code/Debug) and LLM model on separate rows
- Support array content in thinking updates for multiple rows
- Clean up unused imports

feat: Add delete conversation history option in account settings

- Add API endpoint to clear all user conversations
- Add deleteConversationData to UserProfileContext
- Add clearAllConversations to ConversationContext
- Add delete button with confirmation flow in AccountTab
- Standardize SettingsButton with consistent min-width

feat: Add two-phase AI workflow (plan first, then execute)

- Enforce planning before coding: Phase 1 uses read-only tools (glob, read),
  Phase 2 enables all tools (write, validate) after plan is output
- Enhanced debug button to include source file and line number in error messages
- Fixed async error handling in api/gemini.js (added await to catch errors properly)
- Fixed Phase 2 transition bug: continue processing pending function calls
  instead of sending new user message that breaks Gemini conversation flow
- Updated prompts to explain two-phase workflow to AI

chore: Remove dead code across codebase

Delete unused components:
- Auth: LandingPage, SignInPage, SignUpPage (replaced by AuthModal)
- Chat: Input, QuickActions, Error (never used)
- UI: AIResponsePanel, BackgroundDecoration, CollapsedChatIcon,
  FloatingBrowserWindow, KnowledgeBaseToggle, LockScreen, WelcomeScreen
- Pricing: PricingCard, PricingPage (entire folder)
- Usage: UsageDisplay (entire folder)
- Utils: dateUtils

Update chat/index.js to remove dead exports

style: Update settings UI with Grok-style theme selector and cleanup

- Redesign theme buttons with smaller size, filled background selection
- Add detailed sun/moon icons with dots and stars
- Remove profile picture from Account tab
- Remove Included Features section from Subscription tab
- Remove About section from Us page
- Standardize typography across all settings tabs
- Delete unused AboutTab component (dead code)

style: Redesign settings page with uniform professional styling

- Create shared components (SettingsRow, SettingsSeparator, SettingsButton, SettingsSection)
- Update all settings tabs with consistent section headers and separators
- Use monotone colors for progress bars and checkmarks
- Apply uniform typography using theme definitions

chore: Remove LLM prompt validation tests

Remove test files that call external APIs for prompt validation.
These tests are expensive to run and better suited for manual testing.

chore: Reorganize public folder structure

- Remove unused blankspace_transparent (1).png
- Rename banners to banner-dark.png and banner-light.png
- Create images/, icons/, and docs/ subfolders
- Update references in Banner.jsx, index.html, and README.md
chore: Update light banner image

feat: Animated sidebar icons and brand logo

- Add animated icons for Chat, Computer, History with hover effects
- Add BrandLogo component (modern B) for sidebar
- Click empty sidebar space to toggle expand/collapse
- Remove top-right Computer button from ChatPage
- Add framer-motion dependency for animations

fix: Group conversations by creation date instead of last activity

Use createdAt for date grouping so conversations appear under the day
they were started, not when they were last used.

fix: Resolve Firebase Storage and OpenAI Responses API issues

- Add .trim() to Firebase env vars to handle trailing whitespace/newlines
- Transform content format for OpenAI Responses API (text→input_text, image_url→input_image)
- Add cors.json for Firebase Storage CORS configuration

feat: Upload chat images to Firebase Storage

- Initialize Firebase Storage in firebase.js
- Upload images to Storage before sending message
- Store URLs in messages instead of base64 (prevents Firestore 1MB limit)
- Pass base64 to LLM API transiently (not persisted)
- Update Messages.jsx to display from Storage URLs
fix: Pass images through ChatPage handleSend to enable image upload

feat: Add image upload to chat with multimodal support

Add plus button for image uploads that works with both OpenAI (chat intent)
and Gemini (create/debug intent). Images are converted to base64 and
displayed in the conversation alongside text messages.
fix: Reset model selector hover state when dropdown closes

feat: Move model selector to top-left corner (Manus-style)

- Rename model tiers to "Bina Lite" and "Bina Pro"
- Move model selector from Composer to top-left of ChatPage
- Add dropdown with auth gating for Pro tier
- Clean up unused imports from Composer

feat: Add collapsed thinking UI and simplify intent classifier

- Add ThinkingBlock component for Claude-style collapsed thinking display
- Collect and display thinking steps during AI processing
- Show intent classification in thinking block (create/debug/chat)
- Simplify intent classifier by removing fallback regex patterns
- Clear artifact state on new chat to fix intent misclassification
- Update SearchModal button text to "New Chat"

fix: Unify scrollbar to single dark-themed scroller

- Add dark-scrollbar class to ChatPage messages container
- Remove redundant inner scroll from Messages component

refactor: Simplify write tool and fix timeout error handling

- Remove auto-fix from write tool (was causing syntax errors)
- Delete unused autoFix.js utility
- Fix fetchWithRetry timeout handling (DOMException.message is read-only)

feat: Add new UI components, auth pages, and API retry handling

- Add auth components (LandingPage, SignInPage, SignUpPage)
- Add enhanced chat components (ChatPanel, ChatInput, ErrorMessage)
- Add settings tabs (TabbedSettingsPanel, AIPreferenceTab, UsTab)
- Add UI components (TopBar, WelcomeScreen, FloatingBrowserWindow, etc.)
- Add fetchWithRetry utility for resilient API calls
- Redesign Error component with collapsible details and debug button
- Add auto-fix for common code issues in write tool
- Add wallpaper components and style presets
- Add xAI client and intent prompts

feat: Add Show All apps modal and fix conversation display

- Add AppsModal component for viewing all apps with search
- Limit apps popover to 4 most recent with Show All button
- Use actual artifact names instead of conversation titles in apps list
- Remove error messages from chat (errors only show in preview panel)
- Remove Debug button from apps popover

refactor: Simplify component naming and improve code organization

Rename components to shorter, more intuitive names (e.g., ChatGreeting→Banner,
EnhancedChatInput→Composer, ChatPanel→Messages). Extract useEscapeKey hook,
add CSS utility classes, and optimize SearchModal with memoization.

feat: Add search history modal with conversation preview

- Add SearchHistoryModal component with full-screen search interface
- Group conversations by time periods (Last 7 Days, This Year, older)
- Show conversation preview with messages on selection
- Add delete button on hover for each conversation
- Integrate Ctrl+K / Cmd+K keyboard shortcut
- Add unified dark-scrollbar CSS utility class
- Hide history section and disable search for unauthenticated users

style: Theme consistency and settings panel redesign

- Replace hardcoded colors with theme system across all components
- Add Account tab and rename Theme to Appearance in settings
- Add light mode banner support with theme-aware ChatGreeting
- Portal-based user menu for improved z-index handling
- Remove unused useDraggable and useResizable hooks

style: Dark Professional theme and fullscreen app windows

- Replace all UI styles with single "Dark Professional" preset
- Consolidate color palettes to dark-professional only
- Apply Grok-style colors throughout: #f9f9f9 text, #1a1a1a cards, #1f1f1f borders
- Use Inter font with font-normal/medium weights only (no bold/semibold)
- Add Inter font from Google Fonts
- Apps now open fullscreen by default, respecting sidebar position
- Update all settings tabs, chat components, and theme with consistent styling

feat: Chat intent routing with OpenAI web search support

- Route chat intent to OpenAI gpt-5-mini with web_search tool
- Route create/debug intent to Gemini for code generation
- Add intent persistence per conversation (fix stale closure bug)
- Add conversation history context for chat continuity
- Simplify error messages to plain grey text
- Make sidebar text bold, history section collapsible
- Update model tier button styling (rounded rect, no border)
- Remove duplicate intent classification from Gemini provider
- Remove unused xaiClient.js

feat: Sidebar date groupings and login landing page fix

- Add date-based grouping to conversation history (Today, Yesterday, Year)
- Fix login/refresh to always show empty landing page instead of last conversation
- Add "See all" link for expanded history
- Simplify conversation item styling with cleaner minimal design
- Refactor ConversationContext with DRY helpers and better structure

fix: Comprehensive conversation system bug fixes

Critical fixes:
- Fix race conditions in addMessage/setMessages (check before state update)
- Fix ID replacement race condition with atomic batch updates
- Add retry mechanism for failed Firestore syncs (up to 3 retries)
- Fix stale closure using activeConversationIdRef

UI/UX fixes:
- Remove empty plus button dropdown from chat input
- Add loading state to sidebar while fetching conversations
- Fix conversation filtering to show active empty conversation
- Implement conversationId route parameter in ChatPage
- Add title fallback for conversations in sidebar

Code quality fixes:
- Fix message key fallback (use timestamp+type instead of index)
- Add null checks for message.content throughout
- Use theme-aware error colors (dark/light mode support)
- Add message structure validation in API
- Use Firestore transactions for atomic message appending

Also removes wallpaper functionality (light/dark theme only)

refactor: Production-grade chat architecture with mobile optimization

- Add ConversationContext for Firestore persistence (authenticated users)
- Add conversations API endpoint for CRUD operations
- Extract AI processing logic into useAIChat hook
- Simplify App.jsx from 716 to ~230 lines
- Add mobile-responsive UI with optimized sizing and spacing
- Add hamburger menu for mobile sidebar navigation
- Add smooth slide-in animation for mobile sidebar
- Fix chat input alignment on small windows
- Remove unused auth pages, chat app components, and test files

style: Update light mode to greyish white color palette

Replace lavender-tinted background with a cleaner, Apple-style
greyish white theme for better visual clarity.
refactor: Remove category pills, rename Apps to Computer

feat: Grok-style UI redesign for chat interface

- Sidebar: Pure black background, gray pill active states, search bar with Ctrl+K hint
- Chat input: Filled gray background (#1a1a1a), outline-style model dropdown
- Category pills: Hollow/transparent with border only
- Greeting: Replace text with blankspace-banner.png
- Text consistency: Standardize capitalization and placeholders

fix: Make AI response panel responsive on mobile

Use CSS min() to constrain panel width to viewport on small screens
fix: Add explicit STOP CONDITION to prompt to prevent infinite loops
debug: Add tool result logging to ToolExecutor

refactor: Separate write and validate, let AI control the flow

- Remove auto-validate from orchestrator (gemini/index.js)
- Revert write.js to simple file write (no inline validation)
- Update prompt to instruct AI to call validate() after write()
- AI now controls when to validate, following modern agent patterns

perf: Auto-validate JS/JSX in write tool, add framer-motion support

- write() now auto-validates JS/JSX files before writing
- Validation errors block the write and return guidance
- Added framer-motion to allowed third-party imports
- Updated prompt to remove separate validate() mention
- Reduces tool calls by 50% (no separate validate needed)

fix: Add data/ folder support to preview system and validator

- PreviewPanel now exposes exports from data/ files to window scope
- Validator checks for unsupported folder structures (only components/,
  utils/, hooks/, data/ are allowed)
- Fixes "initialDinners is not defined" error when AI generates data files

refactor: Simplify styling prompt for more AI creativity

- Remove prescriptive color palettes and component patterns
- Keep just theme mode and style description
- Let Gemini 3 be creative with specific design choices

refactor: Reorganize AI prompts by intent (chat/generate/debug)

- Create modular prompts/ folder with intent-based structure
- Extract shared utilities (appNameGenerator, tokenReplacer, toolFormatter)
- Consolidate rules into single rules.json
- Remove duplicate code from providers (~100 lines)
- Delete old prompts.json and shared/prompts.js

refactor: Simplify AI prompts for Gemini 2.5

- Remove ~2000 lines of verbose styling/UX guidance from prompts.json
- Keep only 4 critical Sandpack-specific rules (browser renderability,
  no initialization code, package management, framer-motion usage)
- Remove duplicate styling section from CODE_GENERATION_SYSTEM_PROMPT
- Fix framer-motion prompt to explicitly forbid redeclaration

Gemini 2.5 ranks #1 on WebDev Arena and already knows React/web patterns.
We only need to specify Sandpack-specific constraints it can't know.
feat: Widen AI response panel on desktop (520px)

feat: Update welcome screen tagline for better appeal

- Change to "A new way to interact with AI. Build, remix, share—your creative playground awaits."

fix: Use animated LoadingDots component for thinking states

- Replace plain "Thinking..." text with LoadingDots animation in ChatAppPanel
- Show LoadingDots in AIResponsePanel when content is "Thinking..." or empty
- Adjust dot alignment with marginTop for better vertical centering

feat: Add markdown support to chat messages

- Install react-markdown package
- Update AIResponsePanel to render markdown content
- Support bold, lists, code snippets, and paragraphs

feat: Update welcome screen with cloud icon and refined copy

- Add two-cloud SVG icon (large outlined + small solid)
- Change title font to serif (Georgia)
- Update description: Build, remix, and share interfaces
- Update beta notice: Experimental and free during beta

feat: Add welcome screen for first-time visitors

- New WelcomeScreen component shows "Imagine with BlankSpace" on first visit
- Clock screen (LockScreen) now only shows when clicking logo in header
- Welcome screen includes call-to-action and beta feedback links

feat: Add X (Twitter) ads pixel for conversion tracking

- Add X pixel base code to index.html (Pixel ID: qy42i)
- Create xPixel.js utility for tracking conversion events
- Track sign-up conversions with email and user ID for attribution
fix: Align loading dots vertically with Thinking text
chore: Add .env.vercel to gitignore

feat: Add Discord link and reorganize social links in Us tab

- Add DiscordIcon component
- Reorder social links: X, Instagram, Discord in top row
- Move LinkedIn next to GitHub in bottom row
- Increase loading dots size
chore: Update favicon and og-image with new B logo

fix: Handle NaN values in usage tracking and improve UI

- Fix usage display showing null by handling NaN from Firestore
- Add "Thinking" text to loading dots indicator
- Update suggestion pills on landing page
- Use increment response directly to update usage state

style: Refine color palettes with modern minimalist aesthetic

Update all 5 palettes to use more sophisticated, desaturated colors:
- Corporate: Slate/stone tones with sky accent
- Vibrant: Indigo/violet with rose accent (less neon)
- Nature: Sage green/terracotta/teal (removed jarring lime)
- Sunset: Muted coral/dusty rose (softer warmth)
- Monochrome: Warm neutrals instead of cold grays

fix: Update usage display immediately after generation completes

Use increment-usage endpoint response directly to update state instead
of making a separate fetchUsage call that could fail silently.

fix: Merge desktop/mobile Editing Indicators into shared component

- Created EditingIndicator component with responsive styling
- Fixed undefined proComponentsColor causing mobile crash
- Reduced ~30 lines of duplicated code

fix: Expose named exports from utility files in browser preview

IIFE wrapper was only exposing filename as global, not named exports.
Added extractNamedExports() to parse export statements and expose all
named exports (const, function, class, export {}) globally via window
for files in utils/ and hooks/ directories.

Fixes: initialBoard is not defined error when generating chess games

refactor: Remove GOOGLE_API_KEY fallback

Only use GEMINI_API_KEY since GOOGLE_API_KEY doesn't work

refactor: Rename GOOGLE_API_KEY to GEMINI_API_KEY

- Update environment variable name to match Gemini branding
- Add fallback to GOOGLE_API_KEY for backwards compatibility
fix: Inline tips in AIResponsePanel after knowledge folder removal

releases.name: v0.4.0 - Unlock the potential of vibe coding
releases.body: We always prioritize the vibe coding experience on mobile. This release focuses on improving the user experience with a beautiful new home screen. What's New - Home Screen - A mobile-style lock screen greets you when you open blank space, displaying the current time and date with your selected wallpaper theme - Liquid Glass UI - Vertical time display with frosted glass effect that matches your theme - Quick Return - Click the < blank space > logo anytime to return to the home screen - Seamless Experience - Touch anywhere to continue vibe coding

releases.name: v0.3.0 - UI Polish & User Experience
releases.body:
Release notes:
  This release focuses on **UI polish** and **user experience improvements** based on community feedback.

  [![Reddit](https://img.shields.io/badge/Reddit-FF4500?style=flat&logo=reddit&logoColor=white)](https://reddit.com) [![X](https://img.shields.io/badge/X-000000?style=flat&logo=x&logoColor=white)](https://x.com) [![Instagram](https://img.shields.io/badge/Instagram-E4405F?style=flat&logo=instagram&logoColor=white)](https://instagram.com)

  ## New Features
  - 🟢 Fullscreen toggle button (macOS-style window controls)
  - 💬 Conversation history sidebar
  - 👤 User accounts & sign-in
  - 🏪 App Store with templates & detail views
  - ⚡ Model selector (Lite/Pro)

  ## Improvements
  - Liquid glass UI refinements for light mode
  - Persistent AI panel with manual hide/collapse
  - Streamlined settings with Theme, AI Preference, Us tabs
  - Consistent modal sizing and responsive layout

  ## Bug Fixes
  - Edit mode now preserves existing apps
  - Light mode beta badge colors fixed
  - Mobile & desktop hero optimization

  ---

  Thanks to everyone who shared feedback and suggestions! 🙏

releases.name: v0.1.0 – First Public Early Acess
releases.body:
Blank Space is an open‑source AI app builder combining a visual flow designer with a multi‑agent system. Build intelligent apps quickly, bring your own UI, and deploy anywhere.

✨ Highlights

Visual Flow → App: design AI flows and run them instantly.

Composable agents: orchestrate tasks with an extensible core.

Bring your own UI: integrate your favorite components and templates.

Self‑hostable: run locally or deploy to your favorite platform.

🆕 New Features

Reflection loop & quality scores: automatic code review and improvement.

Agent communication & tool registry: agents can message each other and reuse capabilities.

Group chat for multi‑agent collaboration.

User authentication & mobile responsiveness (initial implementations).

releases.name: v0.2.0 — New UI Platform & Gemini 3 Preview (Pre-Release)
releases.body: Following the **v0.1.0 – First Public Release 🎉**, this pre-release pushes Vibe closer to its long-term vision. ### 1. New UI platform (pre-release) We’ve overhauled the UI to better match the future we imagine for Vibe: a platform like iOS where anyone can build apps and share them through an App Store — but for **Vibe-coded apps**. ### 2. Gemini 3 integration (coming soon, free) The **Gemini 3 update is on the way**. Thanks to new **GCP startup credits**, we’ll be rolling out a **free Gemini 3 preview for everyone** in Vibe as we integrate the model into the platform. Vibe with the new UI today — and Gemini 3 is coming soon, for free. 🚀

readme_html:
What is Blank Space?

Open-source AI app builder. Fast, simple, self-hostable (optimized for mobile).

Architecture

┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         FRONTEND                                │
│                         src/                                    │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │  React + Vite                                             │ │
│  │                                                           │ │
│  │  components/     UI components (editor, preview, chat)    │ │
│  │  contexts/       React contexts (auth, files, theme)      │ │
│  │  hooks/          Custom React hooks                       │ │
│  │  services/       Business logic & AI orchestration        │ │
│  │    ├── orchestration/   Multi-agent routing               │ │
│  │    ├── tools/           LLM function calling tools        │ │
│  │    ├── prompts/         Prompt templates                  │ │
│  │    └── utils/           Shared utilities                  │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              │  HTTP/REST API
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      BACKEND API                                │
│                      api/                                       │
│  ┌───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │
│  │  Vercel Serverless Functions                              │ │
│  │                                                           │ │
│  │  chat.js          OpenAI proxy (GPT-5, web search)        │ │
│  │  gemini.js        Google Gemini proxy (code generation)   │ │
│  │  files.js         File CRUD (Firebase Storage)            │ │
│  │  conversations.js Conversation history                    │ │
│  │  user/            User profile, usage, quotas             │ │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘ │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
                              │
                              │  External Services
                              ▼
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│    ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐           │
│    │   OpenAI    │  │   Google    │  │  Firebase   │           │
│    │   GPT-5     │  │   Gemini    │  │ Auth + DB   │           │
│    └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘           │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Directory Structure

/
├── src/                    # React frontend (Vite)
│   ├── components/         # UI components
│   ├── contexts/           # React contexts (auth, files, theme)
│   ├── hooks/              # Custom React hooks
│   ├── services/           # Business logic & AI orchestration
│   │   ├── orchestration/  # Multi-agent routing
│   │   ├── tools/          # LLM function calling tools
│   │   ├── prompts/        # Prompt templates
│   │   └── utils/          # Shared utilities
│   ├── styles/             # Global styles
│   └── templates/          # Project templates
│
├── api/                    # Vercel serverless functions
│   ├── chat.js             # OpenAI chat endpoint
│   ├── gemini.js           # Gemini code generation
│   ├── files.js            # File operations
│   ├── conversations.js    # Conversation history
│   └── user/               # User endpoints
│
└── public/                 # Static assets

Agent System

The orchestration layer routes user requests to specialized agents:

Agent Model Purpose Tools
Code Agent Gemini 3 Flash/Pro Code generation, debugging read, write, edit, glob, grep, validate
Chat Agent GPT-5-mini General conversation, web search None (single response)
Assistant Agent GPT-5-mini File operations on user storage read_file, write_file, list_directory

Data Flow

User Message
    │
    ▼
Intent Classification (GPT-4o-mini)
    │
    ├── "create" / "debug" ──→ Code Agent ──→ Gemini API
    │                              │
    │                              ▼
    │                         Tool Loop (read/write/validate)
    │                              │
    │                              ▼
    │                         Generated Files
    │
    ├── "chat" ──→ Chat Agent ──→ OpenAI API (+ web search)
    │                  │
    │                  ▼
    │             Text Response
    │
    └── "assistant" ──→ Assistant Agent ──→ OpenAI API
                            │
                            ▼
                       File Operations (Firebase Storage)

Deployment

Vercel (Recommended)

npm install
vercel

Quick Start (Development)

# 1) Clone
git clone https://github.com/BrandeisPatrick/blank-space
cd blank-space

# 2) Configure
cp .env.example .env.local
# Edit .env.local with your API keys

# 3) Install & run
npm install
npm run dev
# open http://localhost:5173

Environment Variables

# Required
OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-...
GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY=...

# Firebase (for auth & storage)
FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=...
FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY=...
FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL=...

# Optional
USE_GPT5=true              # Enable GPT-5 models
PRODUCTION_MODE=true       # Use premium models everywhere

Roadmap

  • Web app (current focus)
  • iOS app
  • Android app
  • Your idea here? — open an issue!

Contributing

  1. Fork the repo
  2. Create your feature branch (git checkout -b feature/amazing-feature)
  3. Commit your changes (git commit -m 'Add amazing feature')
  4. Push to the branch (git push origin feature/amazing-feature)
  5. Open a Pull Request

License

Apache 2.0 - see LICENSE for details.
